stage_identity.evidence: Teen Byte form with gangly limbs and awkward teen proportions preserved. Multi-image edit with stage anchor ensured canonical teen silhouette maintained. Byte's pixel art blob body proportions match expected teen stage appearance.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean 2D pixel art style maintained. Output shows dithered shading and readable silhouette consistent with previous edits. Output file is valid 512x512 PNG with 8-bit RGB color.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Byte pose change from typing to trophy-admiring visible. Body turned slightly toward trophy shelf, head tilted upward, hands resting on desk in relaxed posture. Celebratory moment after productive coding session captured.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text, floating glyphs, or malformed anatomy detected. Clean pixel edges preserved throughout. No smearing or duplicated parts visible.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Trophy shelf visible above desk with single golden 10-day trophy positioned on left side and single green plant on right side with clear spacing between. Food bowl positioned on floor to right of desk with moderate kibble fill. No duplicate props or overlapping objects.

anchors_present.evidence: Desk center stage with oversized laptop open. Chicago skyline visible through window in background. All three anchor elements present and properly positioned.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Afternoon warm lighting matches temporal state (1:54 PM Chicago time). Ecstatic mood reflected in bright palette and celebratory pose. Byte wide awake, eyes open and expressive, admiring achievement.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Check not applicable for normal mode. Incremental edit focused on pose change from active typing to trophy admiration only.
